title: lobelia longipes
intro: Lobelia longipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the blue lobelia or long-stalked lobelia, native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia longipes include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia longipes can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
